rulings.Case Title: GAVIN G. HANLIN ET AL VS. SOJOURN PROPERTIES INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-609458 WITH CASE CGC-19-581323
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-609458 WITH CASE CGC-19-581323 is continued to December 29, 2023 to be heard with other pending motions. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: YAHUAN YE ET AL VS. SAU MING YUENG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2023 line 5. DEFENDANT SAU YUENG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Defendants must file an answer no later than January 8, 2023. Complaint states sufficient facts and is not uncertain. Hearing required to address Defendant's multiple failures to comply with the Code of Civil Procedure, Local Rules and the Court's August 24, 2023 minute order and why an order to show cause shall not be issued regarding those failures.
